int.name: int
int.description: A whole number value that can be used for various purposes, such as counting or indexing.

float.name: float
float.description: A floating-point number value that can be used for various purposes, such as representing decimal values or measurements.

string.name: string
string.description: A sequence of characters that can be used for various purposes, such as storing text or messages.

bool.name: bool
bool.description: A boolean value that can be either true or false, often used for conditional logic.

color.name: color
color.description: A color value that can be used for various purposes, such as setting the color of an object or UI element.

api.name: API
api.description: An API value containing information about the request.

player.name: player
player.description: A player value representing a player in the game.

vector3.name: Vector3
vector3.description: A vector3 value representing a point in 3D space.

block.name: block
block.description: A block value representing a block with data within the game.

quaternion.name: quaternion
quaternion.description: A quaternion value representing a rotation in 3D space.

any.name: any
any.description: A value of any type, used for flexible inputs or outputs where the type may vary.

command.name: command
command.description: A command value representing a command string, often used for triggering events or actions based on specific commands.
